allow: PowerShell($dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.node-portable"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; $zip = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp\\node-portable.zip"; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.12.0/node-v22.12.0-win-x64.zip" -OutFile $zip; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Remove-Item $zip; Get-ChildItem $dest)
